creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repo-copy deskutils/sunbird to deskutils/lightning. When the
	repo-copy is done we will commit Lightning 1.0b1 to the new port.
	This allows us to remove the obsolete ports deskutils/sunbird,
	deskutils/sunbird-i18n, deskutils/lightning-xpi and mail/lightning.
	Removing deskutils/lightning-xpi is a prerequisite to commit
	Thunderbird 3.1 to mail/thunderbird.
